title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - Technical Leadership & Communication
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 0 completed course(s), and 8 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 47.9%, completion is 0%, pass rate is 0%, and average score is N/A/10. Total training hours are 34.5 and scaled cost is 4.8. Final effectiveness conclusion is blocked because required evidence is incomplete or course status is not completed. Management interpretation: The course 'Technical Leadership & Communication' is currently in progress with no completions reported. Attendance stands at 47.9% with no trainees having completed the course, resulting in a completion and pass rate of 0%. The average score is not applicable due to the lack of assessments. The feedback rating is relatively high at 4.8 out of 5, indicating positive perceptions of the course content thus far. However, the overall effectiveness conclusion is blocked due to incomplete evidence.
insights: Technical Leadership & Communication has an effectiveness score of 25.58 in the selected scope.
1 course group contained learners who need support based on score or attendance policy.
10 high-priority L&D NORM flags were triggered.
Evidence status is BLOCKED; conclusions must be limited to validated metrics.
Additionally, the absence of completed assessments has led to a 0% pass rate, indicating a significant risk of trainees not achieving the desired learning outcomes.
The course's current status as 'In Progress' prevents a final effectiveness conclusion, highlighting a need for timely completion and assessment submission.
recommendations: Do not publish a final effectiveness conclusion until blocked evidence items are resolved.
Use this output as a preliminary readiness report and assign owners to missing evidence items.
Open a course content review with the L&D manager and confirm the improvement owner.
Mark incomplete learner records for review and schedule re-enrollment in the next suitable cohort.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.
